title: Profile Violation — c2pa.cropped Without Required Parent Ingredient
description: Verifies that a conformant validator correctly reports a valid claim signature for a manifest that includes a c2pa.cropped action but no parentOf ingredient. An inception-type action that modifies a pre-existing asset MUST reference the source via a parentOf ingredient; omitting it is a profile violation.

validationStatus.explanation: The claim signature is cryptographically valid. The missing parentOf ingredient for a modification action is a profile-level violation.
